Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request an extension for the [Project Name] assignment, which is currently due on [Date two days from now]. Due to [Brief, professional reason—e.g., an unexpected heavy workload this week, a sudden personal matter, or minor technical difficulties], I have fallen behind schedule and do not feel I can submit my best work by the original deadline.

I am currently making significant progress, and I am confident I can complete the project to the standard I know you expect. Would it be possible to have an extension until [Proposed New Date, e.g., Friday, next week]?

I sincerely apologize for the late notice regarding this request. I understand the importance of meeting deadlines, and I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause in your grading schedule.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]<turn|>

**Subject:** Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request an extension for the [Project Name] assignment, which is currently due on [Date two days from now]. Due to [Brief, professional reason—e.g., an unexpected heavy workload this week, a sudden personal matter, or minor technical difficulties], I have fallen behind schedule and do not feel I can submit my best work by the original deadline.

I am currently making significant progress, and I am confident I can complete the project to the standard I know you expect. Would it be possible to have an extension until [Proposed New Date, e.g., Friday, next week]?

I sincerely apologize for the late notice regarding this request. I understand the importance of meeting deadlines, and I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause in your grading schedule.

Thank you very much for considering my request. I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]<turn|>
